name: VISHAY INTERTECHNOLOGY INC
summary: Vishay Intertechnology, Inc. manufactures one of the world's largest portfolios of discrete semiconductors and passive electronic components. Products include MOSFETs, diodes, optoelectronic components, resistors, inductors, and capacitors. These components serve automotive, industrial, computing, consumer, telecommunications, military, aerospace, and healthcare markets worldwide. Founded in 1962, Vishay grew through organic development and strategic acquisitions, becoming a global leader in wire wound power shunts, power inductors, tantalum capacitors, power rectifiers, low-voltage power MOSFETs, and infrared components.

products.name: MOSFETs
products.description: Power control and management semiconductor components including low-voltage power MOSFETs.

products.name: Diodes
products.description: Discrete semiconductor components including power rectifiers for signal and power applications.

products.name: Optoelectronic Components
products.description: Infrared and other optoelectronic semiconductor components for remote control and circuit isolation.

products.name: Resistors
products.description: Includes Bulk Metal foil resistors, wire wound power shunts, leaded and thin film SMD resistors, and non-linear resistors.

products.name: Inductors
products.description: Power inductors used to store and discharge energy in electronic circuits.

products.name: Capacitors
products.description: Wet and polymer tantalum capacitors in conformal-coated packages for energy storage and filtering.

products.name: Bulk Metal Foil Resistors
products.description: Ultra-precise, ultra-stable resistors originally invented by Dr. Felix Zandman, with industry-leading performance.

products.name: PhotoStress Coatings and Instruments
products.description: Coatings and instruments used to reveal and measure stress distribution in structures under live load conditions.

products.name: Resistance Strain Gages
products.description: Foil resistance strain gages used for structural measurement applications.
